## /spec linear issues — generate issue-summaries.json

Produce a short, human-friendly Sub-Issue title and description for every task listed below. The task list is authoritative — do NOT add, drop, or rename tasks.

### Inputs
- tasks.md (reference only): /Users/csepulveda-gg/Developer/glossgenius/core-bookings/specs/002-booking-rules-pipeline/tasks.md
- Output file: /Users/csepulveda-gg/Developer/glossgenius/core-bookings/specs/002-booking-rules-pipeline/issue-summaries.json (overwrite if it already exists)

### Tasks to summarize

#### Phase 1: Setup — Proto Contract (core-protos)
- `T001` — [P] Create BookingRule resource message, enums (BookingRuleType, BookingRuleImplementation), and BookingRuleConfigurationResult message in `src/com/glossgenius/services/core_bookings/resources/booking_rules.proto` — BookingRule serves as both response resource and desired-state input for ConfigureBookingRules (no action enum)
- `T002` — [P] Create SearchBookingRules request/response with BookingRuleSearchFilters (business, target_location_tokens[], target_space_member_tokens[], types[], implementations[], enabled) in `src/com/glossgenius/services/core_bookings/methods/search_booking_rules.proto`
- `T003` — [P] Create ConfigureBookingRules request (repeated BookingRule as desired-state) and response (repeated BookingRuleConfigurationResult as per-item results, top-level errors) in `src/com/glossgenius/services/core_bookings/methods/configure_booking_rules.proto`
- `T004` — Register SearchBookingRules and ConfigureBookingRules RPC methods in `src/com/glossgenius/services/core_bookings/service.proto`
- `T005` — Add BUSINESS_BOOKING_RULES_MANAGE (53) and BUSINESS_BOOKING_RULES_VIEW (54) to PolicyActionName enum in `src/com/glossgenius/protos/common/permissions/policies.proto`

#### Phase 2: Foundational — Domain Model, Templates & Persistence (core-bookings)
- `T006` — Create Liquibase migration for `booking_rules` table with all columns, indexes (token unique, composite uniqueness on `(business_token, target_location_token, COALESCE(target_space_member_token, ''), implementation)` where deleted_at IS NULL, business+enabled, business+location+enabled), and constraints per data-model.md in `src/main/resources/db/2026-04-16-1.yml`
- `T007` — Run jOOQ code generation to produce BookingRulesRecord in `src/jooq/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/stores/records/jooq/`
- `T008` — [P] Create BookingRuleType enum (BUILT_IN) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRuleType.kt`
- `T009` — [P] Create BookingRuleImplementation enum (CLUSTER_BOOKING) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRuleImplementation.kt`
- `T010` — [P] Create BookingRule data class with nullableToken pattern per data-model.md in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRule.kt`
- `T011` — [P] Create BookingRuleTemplate data class (type, implementation, name, description, defaultParameters) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRuleTemplate.kt`
- `T012` — [P] Create BookingRuleTemplates registry object with CLUSTER_BOOKING constant and findByImplementation() in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRuleTemplates.kt`
- `T013` — [P] Create BookingRuleErrors with error factory functions (newBookingRuleNotFoundError, newBookingRuleTemplateNotFoundError, newMissingFieldError) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRuleErrors.kt`
- `T014` — Create BookingRuleConverters with toBookingRule() on BookingRulesRecord and toRecord() in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/stores/converters/BookingRuleConverters.kt`
- `T015` — Create BookingRuleStore with upsert on (business/target_location/target_provider/implementation), retrieve by token, flexible search (filterable by business, target_locations[], target_providers[], types[], implementations[], enabled), and update methods using jOOQ DSLContext in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/stores/BookingRuleStore.kt`
- `T016` — Create BookingRuleProtoConverters with toProto(), toDesiredState() (proto BookingRule to domain with optional field handling), and toConfigurationResult() in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/handlers/converters/BookingRuleProtoConverters.kt`
- `T017` — [P] Create BookingRuleFactory with newBookingRule() and newBookingRuleTemplate() test data factories in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/factories/BookingRuleFactory.kt`
- `T018` — Create BookingRuleStoreTest covering: create from template, upsert idempotency on (business, target_location, target_provider, implementation), two different implementations coexisting at same scope, retrieve by token, flexible search with multi-criteria filters, update, uniqueness constraint violation, soft-delete exclusion in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/stores/BookingRuleStoreTest.kt`

#### Phase 3: User Story 1 — Configure and Search Booking Rules (Priority: P1) MVP
- `T019` — [P] [US1] Create ConfigureBookingRulesOperation that iterates desired-state BookingRule list, reconciles each independently (best-effort): looks up by (business, target_location, target_provider, implementation) or token — if not found creates from template, if found applies desired-state fields (enabled, parameters, name/description) respecting optional field semantics ("omit = don't change"), collects per-item results in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/rules/ConfigureBookingRulesOperation.kt`
- `T020` — [P] [US1] Create SearchBookingRulesOperation that queries rules from BookingRuleStore with flexible multi-criteria filters (business, locations, providers, types, implementations, enabled status) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/rules/SearchBookingRulesOperation.kt`
- `T021` — [US1] Create ConfigureBookingRulesHandler extending RpcHandler with @RpcMethod(SERVICE_NAME), validate request, check BUSINESS_BOOKING_RULES_MANAGE permission, delegate to ConfigureBookingRulesOperation, return per-item results in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/handlers/rpc/ConfigureBookingRulesHandler.kt`
- `T022` — [US1] Create SearchBookingRulesHandler extending RpcHandler with @RpcMethod(SERVICE_NAME), validate request, check BUSINESS_BOOKING_RULES_VIEW permission, delegate to SearchBookingRulesOperation, convert results to proto in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/handlers/rpc/SearchBookingRulesHandler.kt`
- `T023` — [P] [US1] Create ConfigureBookingRulesOperationTest covering: create new rule from template (verify name/description from template), enable existing disabled rule, disable existing enabled rule, enable+disable in same request, two different implementations at same scope, idempotent re-enable/re-disable, per-item error for invalid location, per-item error for unknown implementation, optional field semantics (omit enabled = don't change), update name override in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/rules/ConfigureBookingRulesOperationTest.kt`
- `T024` — [P] [US1] Create SearchBookingRulesOperationTest covering: query returns both enabled+disabled by default, filter by locations[], filter by providers[], filter by types[], filter by implementations[], filter by enabled status, combined filters, empty results in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/rules/SearchBookingRulesOperationTest.kt`
- `T025` — [P] [US1] Create ConfigureBookingRulesHandlerTest covering: successful bulk configure with permission, rejected without BUSINESS_BOOKING_RULES_MANAGE, per-item results in proto response in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/handlers/rpc/ConfigureBookingRulesHandlerTest.kt`
- `T026` — [P] [US1] Create SearchBookingRulesHandlerTest covering: successful search with permission, rejected without BUSINESS_BOOKING_RULES_VIEW, filter passthrough in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/handlers/rpc/SearchBookingRulesHandlerTest.kt`
- `T027` — [P] [US1] Create booking_rule_converters.ts with edge request/response types and converter functions for search (query params to proto filters) and configure (body with BookingRule array to proto, proto results to edge response) in `src/app/handlers/bookings/converters/booking_rule_converters.ts`
- `T028` — [P] [US1] Create search_booking_rules_handler.ts using grpcProxyHandler with toSearchBookingRulesRequest converter, toEdgeSearchBookingRulesResponse converter, and CoreBookingsClient().searchBookingRules in `src/app/handlers/bookings/search_booking_rules_handler.ts`
- `T029` — [P] [US1] Create configure_booking_rules_handler.ts using grpcProxyHandler with toConfigureBookingRulesRequest converter, toEdgeConfigureBookingRulesResponse converter, and CoreBookingsClient().configureBookingRules in `src/app/handlers/bookings/configure_booking_rules_handler.ts`
- `T030` — [US1] Register v4 routes in `src/app/handlers/index.ts`: GET /v4/booking-rules with authenticated(AuthType.BUSINESS_MEMBER) + searchBookingRulesHandler, POST /v4/booking-rules/configure with authenticated(AuthType.BUSINESS_MEMBER) + configureBookingRulesHandler
- `T031` — [P] [US1] Create search_booking_rules_handler.test.ts covering: search proxy roundtrip, filter conversion, auth required in `src/test/handlers/bookings/search_booking_rules_handler.test.ts`
- `T032` — [P] [US1] Create configure_booking_rules_handler.test.ts covering: bulk configure proxy roundtrip, per-item results forwarded, auth required in `src/test/handlers/bookings/configure_booking_rules_handler.test.ts`

#### Phase 4: User Story 2 — Rules Pipeline Scaffold (Priority: P2)
- `T033` — [P] [US2] Create BookingRuleFilter interface with `fun apply(bookings: List<Booking>, context: BookingRuleContext): List<Booking>` and BookingRuleContext data class in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/pipeline/BookingRuleFilter.kt` and `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/pipeline/BookingRuleContext.kt`
- `T034` — [P] [US2] Create ClusterBookingFilter implementing BookingRuleFilter with pass-through (returns input unchanged) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/pipeline/ClusterBookingFilter.kt`
- `T035` — [US2] Create AvailabilityPipelineOperation that orchestrates Step 1 (delegate to existing availability calculation) then Step 2 (load active rules from BookingRuleStore, apply filters sequentially) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/pipeline/AvailabilityPipelineOperation.kt`
- `T036` — [US2] Wire AvailabilityPipelineOperation into the SearchBookingAvailabilities flow so availability requests go through the pipeline
- `T037` — [US2] Create AvailabilityPipelineOperationTest covering: pipeline runs both steps, output identical to direct calculation, pass-through with active rules, pass-through with no rules, error propagation from Step 1 in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/pipeline/AvailabilityPipelineOperationTest.kt`

#### Phase 5: User Story 3 — Extensibility Validation (Priority: P3)
- `T038` — [US3] Verify extensibility: confirm enums are Kotlin enums (not DB enums), DB columns are varchar, adding a new enum value and template compiles and store/converter code handles it. Document in code comment in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRuleImplementation.kt`

#### Phase 6: Polish & Cross-Cutting Concerns
- `T039` — Run core-bookings full test suite (`./gradlew test`) and verify all tests pass
- `T040` — Verify ArchUnit tests pass with new classes in correct layers
- `T041` — Run edge-core-api test suite (`npm test`) and verify all tests pass
- `T042` — Validate quickstart.md scenarios match implemented behavior

### Rules
1. Emit exactly one entry per `taskId` listed above. Do NOT invent extra entries or omit any. Task ids and phase numbers must match exactly.
2. `subIssueTitle` MUST be a short, imperative summary. It MUST NOT include `Tnnn` identifiers, `[P]` parallel markers, `[USn]` user-story markers, absolute filesystem paths, or references to spec artifacts (plan.md, tasks.md, checklist.md).
3. `subIssueDescription` MUST contain the implementation details of the task, cleaned of the same identifiers and absolute paths. Relative paths from the repo root are fine. Preserve meaningful content (file names, rationale, acceptance criteria).
4. Group tasks by `phaseNumber` matching the heading they appear under above.

### Output format
Write strictly valid JSON of shape:
```json
{
  "phases": [
    {
      "phaseNumber": 1,
      "tasks": [
        {
          "taskId": "T001",
          "subIssueTitle": "Create protobuf resources for BookingRule-related entities",
          "subIssueDescription": "Create BookingRule resource message, enums..."
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

After writing the file, reply with a single line naming the file path. Do not call any Linear tool — the extension handles that step.

# Tasks: Booking Rules Pipeline Foundations

**Input**: Design documents from `specs/002-booking-rules-pipeline/`
**Prerequisites**: plan.md, spec.md, research.md, data-model.md, contracts/

## Format: `[ID] [P?] [Story] Description`

- **[P]**: Can run in parallel (different files, no dependencies)
- **[Story]**: Which user story this task belongs to (US1, US2, US3)

---

## Phase 1: Setup — Proto Contract (core-protos)

**Purpose**: Define the gRPC contract and permissions. Blocks core-bookings and edge-core-api.

**Repo**: `core-protos`

- [ ] T001 [P] Create BookingRule resource message, enums (BookingRuleType, BookingRuleImplementation), and BookingRuleConfigurationResult message in `src/com/glossgenius/services/core_bookings/resources/booking_rules.proto` — BookingRule serves as both response resource and desired-state input for ConfigureBookingRules (no action enum)
- [ ] T002 [P] Create SearchBookingRules request/response with BookingRuleSearchFilters (business, target_location_tokens[], target_space_member_tokens[], types[], implementations[], enabled) in `src/com/glossgenius/services/core_bookings/methods/search_booking_rules.proto`
- [ ] T003 [P] Create ConfigureBookingRules request (repeated BookingRule as desired-state) and response (repeated BookingRuleConfigurationResult as per-item results, top-level errors) in `src/com/glossgenius/services/core_bookings/methods/configure_booking_rules.proto`
- [ ] T004 Register SearchBookingRules and ConfigureBookingRules RPC methods in `src/com/glossgenius/services/core_bookings/service.proto`
- [ ] T005 Add BUSINESS_BOOKING_RULES_MANAGE (53) and BUSINESS_BOOKING_RULES_VIEW (54) to PolicyActionName enum in `src/com/glossgenius/protos/common/permissions/policies.proto`

**Checkpoint**: Proto contract merged. Downstream repos can consume new definitions.

---

## Phase 2: Foundational — Domain Model, Templates & Persistence (core-bookings)

**Purpose**: Database schema, domain model, template registry, store, converters. Blocks all user stories.

**CRITICAL**: No user story work can begin until this phase is complete.

**Repo**: `core-bookings`

- [ ] T006 Create Liquibase migration for `booking_rules` table with all columns, indexes (token unique, composite uniqueness on `(business_token, target_location_token, COALESCE(target_space_member_token, ''), implementation)` where deleted_at IS NULL, business+enabled, business+location+enabled), and constraints per data-model.md in `src/main/resources/db/2026-04-16-1.yml`
- [ ] T007 Run jOOQ code generation to produce BookingRulesRecord in `src/jooq/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/stores/records/jooq/`
- [ ] T008 [P] Create BookingRuleType enum (BUILT_IN) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRuleType.kt`
- [ ] T009 [P] Create BookingRuleImplementation enum (CLUSTER_BOOKING) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRuleImplementation.kt`
- [ ] T010 [P] Create BookingRule data class with nullableToken pattern per data-model.md in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRule.kt`
- [ ] T011 [P] Create BookingRuleTemplate data class (type, implementation, name, description, defaultParameters) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRuleTemplate.kt`
- [ ] T012 [P] Create BookingRuleTemplates registry object with CLUSTER_BOOKING constant and findByImplementation() in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRuleTemplates.kt`
- [ ] T013 [P] Create BookingRuleErrors with error factory functions (newBookingRuleNotFoundError, newBookingRuleTemplateNotFoundError, newMissingFieldError) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRuleErrors.kt`
- [ ] T014 Create BookingRuleConverters with toBookingRule() on BookingRulesRecord and toRecord() in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/stores/converters/BookingRuleConverters.kt`
- [ ] T015 Create BookingRuleStore with upsert on (business/target_location/target_provider/implementation), retrieve by token, flexible search (filterable by business, target_locations[], target_providers[], types[], implementations[], enabled), and update methods using jOOQ DSLContext in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/stores/BookingRuleStore.kt`
- [ ] T016 Create BookingRuleProtoConverters with toProto(), toDesiredState() (proto BookingRule to domain with optional field handling), and toConfigurationResult() in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/handlers/converters/BookingRuleProtoConverters.kt`
- [ ] T017 [P] Create BookingRuleFactory with newBookingRule() and newBookingRuleTemplate() test data factories in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/factories/BookingRuleFactory.kt`
- [ ] T018 Create BookingRuleStoreTest covering: create from template, upsert idempotency on (business, target_location, target_provider, implementation), two different implementations coexisting at same scope, retrieve by token, flexible search with multi-criteria filters, update, uniqueness constraint violation, soft-delete exclusion in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/stores/BookingRuleStoreTest.kt`

**Checkpoint**: Foundation ready — templates defined, instances can be persisted, queried, and updated.

---

## Phase 3: User Story 1 — Configure and Search Booking Rules (Priority: P1) MVP

**Goal**: Business members can search rules by flexible criteria and configure multiple rules in bulk using desired-state `BookingRule` messages via HTTP (edge-core-api) proxying to gRPC (core-bookings). Best-effort per-item results. Enabling creates from template. Multiple rule implementations can coexist at the same scope.

**Independent Test**: POST /v4/booking-rules/configure with a bulk desired-state request (enable Cluster Booking at 2 locations, disable one). GET /v4/booking-rules with filters. Verify template values, state changes, per-item errors for invalid operations, permission enforcement.

### core-bookings: Operations + gRPC Handlers

- [ ] T019 [P] [US1] Create ConfigureBookingRulesOperation that iterates desired-state BookingRule list, reconciles each independently (best-effort): looks up by (business, target_location, target_provider, implementation) or token — if not found creates from template, if found applies desired-state fields (enabled, parameters, name/description) respecting optional field semantics ("omit = don't change"), collects per-item results in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/rules/ConfigureBookingRulesOperation.kt`
- [ ] T020 [P] [US1] Create SearchBookingRulesOperation that queries rules from BookingRuleStore with flexible multi-criteria filters (business, locations, providers, types, implementations, enabled status) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/rules/SearchBookingRulesOperation.kt`
- [ ] T021 [US1] Create ConfigureBookingRulesHandler extending RpcHandler with @RpcMethod(SERVICE_NAME), validate request, check BUSINESS_BOOKING_RULES_MANAGE permission, delegate to ConfigureBookingRulesOperation, return per-item results in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/handlers/rpc/ConfigureBookingRulesHandler.kt`
- [ ] T022 [US1] Create SearchBookingRulesHandler extending RpcHandler with @RpcMethod(SERVICE_NAME), validate request, check BUSINESS_BOOKING_RULES_VIEW permission, delegate to SearchBookingRulesOperation, convert results to proto in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/handlers/rpc/SearchBookingRulesHandler.kt`

### core-bookings: Tests

- [ ] T023 [P] [US1] Create ConfigureBookingRulesOperationTest covering: create new rule from template (verify name/description from template), enable existing disabled rule, disable existing enabled rule, enable+disable in same request, two different implementations at same scope, idempotent re-enable/re-disable, per-item error for invalid location, per-item error for unknown implementation, optional field semantics (omit enabled = don't change), update name override in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/rules/ConfigureBookingRulesOperationTest.kt`
- [ ] T024 [P] [US1] Create SearchBookingRulesOperationTest covering: query returns both enabled+disabled by default, filter by locations[], filter by providers[], filter by types[], filter by implementations[], filter by enabled status, combined filters, empty results in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/rules/SearchBookingRulesOperationTest.kt`
- [ ] T025 [P] [US1] Create ConfigureBookingRulesHandlerTest covering: successful bulk configure with permission, rejected without BUSINESS_BOOKING_RULES_MANAGE, per-item results in proto response in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/handlers/rpc/ConfigureBookingRulesHandlerTest.kt`
- [ ] T026 [P] [US1] Create SearchBookingRulesHandlerTest covering: successful search with permission, rejected without BUSINESS_BOOKING_RULES_VIEW, filter passthrough in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/handlers/rpc/SearchBookingRulesHandlerTest.kt`

### edge-core-api: v4 HTTP Proxy Endpoints

**Repo**: `edge-core-api`

- [ ] T027 [P] [US1] Create booking_rule_converters.ts with edge request/response types and converter functions for search (query params to proto filters) and configure (body with BookingRule array to proto, proto results to edge response) in `src/app/handlers/bookings/converters/booking_rule_converters.ts`
- [ ] T028 [P] [US1] Create search_booking_rules_handler.ts using grpcProxyHandler with toSearchBookingRulesRequest converter, toEdgeSearchBookingRulesResponse converter, and CoreBookingsClient().searchBookingRules in `src/app/handlers/bookings/search_booking_rules_handler.ts`
- [ ] T029 [P] [US1] Create configure_booking_rules_handler.ts using grpcProxyHandler with toConfigureBookingRulesRequest converter, toEdgeConfigureBookingRulesResponse converter, and CoreBookingsClient().configureBookingRules in `src/app/handlers/bookings/configure_booking_rules_handler.ts`
- [ ] T030 [US1] Register v4 routes in `src/app/handlers/index.ts`: GET /v4/booking-rules with authenticated(AuthType.BUSINESS_MEMBER) + searchBookingRulesHandler, POST /v4/booking-rules/configure with authenticated(AuthType.BUSINESS_MEMBER) + configureBookingRulesHandler

### edge-core-api: Tests

- [ ] T031 [P] [US1] Create search_booking_rules_handler.test.ts covering: search proxy roundtrip, filter conversion, auth required in `src/test/handlers/bookings/search_booking_rules_handler.test.ts`
- [ ] T032 [P] [US1] Create configure_booking_rules_handler.test.ts covering: bulk configure proxy roundtrip, per-item results forwarded, auth required in `src/test/handlers/bookings/configure_booking_rules_handler.test.ts`

**Checkpoint**: User Story 1 complete — end-to-end rule management: HTTP -> gRPC -> DB. Desired-state bulk configure with per-item results. Flexible search. Permission-gated.

---

## Phase 4: User Story 2 — Rules Pipeline Scaffold (Priority: P2)

**Goal**: Availability search executes a two-step pipeline (availability calculation then rule filtering pass-through). Output identical to pre-pipeline results.

**Independent Test**: Request booking availabilities. Verify pipeline runs both steps. Output matches direct core-api calculation.

**Depends on**: Phase 2 (Foundational). Does NOT depend on US1.

**Repo**: `core-bookings`

- [ ] T033 [P] [US2] Create BookingRuleFilter interface with `fun apply(bookings: List<Booking>, context: BookingRuleContext): List<Booking>` and BookingRuleContext data class in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/pipeline/BookingRuleFilter.kt` and `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/pipeline/BookingRuleContext.kt`
- [ ] T034 [P] [US2] Create ClusterBookingFilter implementing BookingRuleFilter with pass-through (returns input unchanged) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/pipeline/ClusterBookingFilter.kt`
- [ ] T035 [US2] Create AvailabilityPipelineOperation that orchestrates Step 1 (delegate to existing availability calculation) then Step 2 (load active rules from BookingRuleStore, apply filters sequentially) in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/pipeline/AvailabilityPipelineOperation.kt`
- [ ] T036 [US2] Wire AvailabilityPipelineOperation into the SearchBookingAvailabilities flow so availability requests go through the pipeline
- [ ] T037 [US2] Create AvailabilityPipelineOperationTest covering: pipeline runs both steps, output identical to direct calculation, pass-through with active rules, pass-through with no rules, error propagation from Step 1 in `src/test/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/operations/pipeline/AvailabilityPipelineOperationTest.kt`

**Checkpoint**: User Story 2 complete — availability search goes through pipeline. Zero regression.

---

## Phase 5: User Story 3 — Extensibility Validation (Priority: P3)

**Goal**: Verify data model supports future rule types without schema changes.

**Independent Test**: Add a new enum value + template, confirm it compiles and persists without migration.

**Repo**: `core-bookings`

- [ ] T038 [US3] Verify extensibility: confirm enums are Kotlin enums (not DB enums), DB columns are varchar, adding a new enum value and template compiles and store/converter code handles it. Document in code comment in `src/main/kotlin/com/glossgenius/core/bookings/models/BookingRuleImplementation.kt`

**Checkpoint**: Extensibility validated.

---

## Phase 6: Polish & Cross-Cutting Concerns

- [ ] T039 Run core-bookings full test suite (`./gradlew test`) and verify all tests pass
- [ ] T040 Verify ArchUnit tests pass with new classes in correct layers
- [ ] T041 Run edge-core-api test suite (`npm test`) and verify all tests pass
- [ ] T042 Validate quickstart.md scenarios match implemented behavior

---

## Dependencies & Execution Order

### Phase Dependencies

- **Phase 1 (Setup)**: No dependencies. Cross-repo (core-protos).
- **Phase 2 (Foundational)**: Depends on Phase 1. BLOCKS all user stories.
- **Phase 3 (US1)**: Depends on Phase 2. core-bookings and edge-core-api work can run in parallel.
- **Phase 4 (US2)**: Depends on Phase 2. Can run in parallel with Phase 3.
- **Phase 5 (US3)**: Depends on Phase 2. Can run in parallel with Phase 3 and 4.
- **Phase 6 (Polish)**: Depends on all previous phases.

### User Story Dependencies

- **US1 (P1)**: Spans core-bookings + edge-core-api. Can start after Phase 2.
- **US2 (P2)**: core-bookings only. Independent of US1.
- **US3 (P3)**: Independent of US1 and US2.

### Parallel Opportunities

- **Phase 1**: T001–T003 in parallel (different proto files)
- **Phase 2**: T008–T013 in parallel (model/template files); T017 in parallel with T014–T016
- **Phase 3 core-bookings**: T019–T020 in parallel; T023–T026 in parallel
- **Phase 3 edge-core-api**: T027–T029 in parallel; T031–T032 in parallel
- **Phase 3 + Phase 4**: core-bookings US1 and US2 can run in parallel

---

## Parallel Example: 3 Engineers

```
# After Phase 2 checkpoint:

# Engineer A: US1 core-bookings
T019-T020 (operations, parallel) -> T021-T022 (handlers) -> T023-T026 (tests, parallel)

# Engineer B: US1 edge-core-api
T027 (converters) -> T028-T029 (handlers, parallel) -> T030 (routes) -> T031-T032 (tests, parallel)

# Engineer C: US2 pipeline (independent of US1)
T033-T034 (interface + filter, parallel) -> T035 (pipeline) -> T036 (wiring) -> T037 (test)
```

---

## Implementation Strategy

### MVP First (User Story 1 Only)

1. Phase 1: Proto contract in core-protos
2. Phase 2: Domain model + templates + persistence in core-bookings
3. Phase 3: US1 — gRPC handlers (core-bookings) + v4 HTTP endpoints (edge-core-api)
4. **STOP and VALIDATE**: End-to-end desired-state configure + flexible search via HTTP
5. Deploy if ready

### Incremental Delivery

1. Phase 1 + Phase 2 -> Foundation ready
2. Add US1 -> End-to-end rule management -> **MVP shipped**
3. Add US2 -> Pipeline scaffold -> Availability search through pipeline
4. Add US3 -> Extensibility validated

---

## Notes

- 2-method API: `SearchBookingRules` (flexible query) + `ConfigureBookingRules` (bulk desired-state)
- ConfigureBookingRules accepts `BookingRule` messages directly — no action enum, no operation wrapper
- Desired-state reconciliation: system creates from template or updates existing based on upsert key
- `optional` field semantics: omit = don't change for existing rules
- Upsert key: (business, target_location, target_provider, implementation) — multiple implementations coexist
- Best-effort bulk: per-item success/failure in response
- Search returns both enabled and disabled by default (optional enabled filter)
- Search filters: repeated fields use OR within field, AND across fields
- 3 repos: core-protos -> core-bookings + edge-core-api
- edge-core-api uses `grpcProxyHandler`, `CoreBookingsClient` already configured
- Constitution: no `@Inject`, no `constructor` keyword, `val` over `var`, Logger first
